items.name: Windows-Search-Redirector
items.description: A Windhawk mod that replaces Windows Search entry points with a configurable launcher such as PowerToys Command Palette, PowerToys Run, or a custom command. It intercepts common Search triggers, opens the replacement launcher, and forwards the text already typed or pasted during the transition.
